title: Error in the week1 exam.
body:
There is def. an error in exam 1. I don't want to give it away but i have triple checked it and theres an error in the 5 point question.

Boolean operators

(5 points possible)
Complete the following truth table dragging and dropping the values (true/false) for each of the expressions, considering the given values of p, q and r. (This exercise may not be compatible with mobile devices: we recommend that you use a computer.).

Be sure that you mark all the correct answers (otherwise your will get 0 points):
author: student1

comments.author: student1
comments.body:
The error is in Exam 1 for the question: 
Boolean operators

(5 points possible)
Complete the following truth table dragging and dropping the values (true/false) for each of the expressions, considering the given values of p, q and r. (This exercise may not be compatible with mobile devices: we recommend that you use a computer.).

Be sure that you mark all the correct answers (otherwise your will get 0 points):

If you look at my answer it is correct and i verified it on my computer after. If you check you will see there is one wrong which the answer key calls out but it isn't. i don't want to give out more unless you want me too since others could be taking the exam still.

comments.author: student1
comments.body:
Hello

Have you had a chance to see what i'm talking about.
If you like i can attach a screen cap to this email to show you my answer for this problem.

Mirko

comments.author: student1
comments.body:
I'm attaching a screen cap of my Answer and you should check it because its rite and i also tested it in my Java IDE too and its rite how i have it listed but one of them is showing wrong in your answer sheet and your sheet is wrong. I should get full credit for this and I'm not getting it.

![Screen cap of problem in question][1]
